% --- Ablation Study ---
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Ablation study results (mean accuracy \%, 5 seeds $\times$ 5-fold CV).}
\label{tab:ablation}
\small
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{5pt}
\begin{tabular}{lcccccc}
\toprule
\textbf{Variant} & \textbf{Infectious} & \textbf{DBLP} & \textbf{Tumblr} & \textbf{MIT} & \textbf{Highschool} & \textbf{Facebook} \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{7}{l}{\textit{Core Components}} \\
\quad Full TCBG & \textbf{69.8}$_{\pm1.9}$ & \textbf{93.7}$_{\pm0.3}$ & \textbf{56.6}$_{\pm1.5}$ & \textbf{69.8}$_{\pm2.9}$ & \textbf{62.6}$_{\pm1.6}$ & \textbf{70.3}$_{\pm1.9}$ \\
\quad w/o Global Features & 66.6$_{\pm2.4}$ & 88.5$_{\pm0.6}$ & 56.9$_{\pm1.9}$ & 72.1$_{\pm3.6}$ & 61.9$_{\pm2.8}$ & 56.9$_{\pm0.7}$ \\
\quad w/o JK-Max & 73.2$_{\pm2.6}$ & 93.9$_{\pm0.5}$ & 55.3$_{\pm2.4}$ & 68.8$_{\pm3.8}$ & 57.4$_{\pm2.7}$ & 67.0$_{\pm1.1}$ \\
\quad w/o Curvature $\kappa$ (K=1) & 80.0$_{\pm2.1}$ & 92.3$_{\pm0.6}$ & 59.8$_{\pm1.0}$ & 69.1$_{\pm4.7}$ & 56.2$_{\pm2.2}$ & 74.3$_{\pm0.4}$ \\
\quad w/o Global + JK-Max & 67.3$_{\pm2.5}$ & 88.5$_{\pm0.5}$ & 52.5$_{\pm2.3}$ & 68.2$_{\pm3.3}$ & 57.4$_{\pm2.3}$ & 55.9$_{\pm1.1}$ \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{7}{l}{\textit{Curvature Resolution}} \\
\quad K_grid=3 (near 1D) & 76.4$_{\pm1.8}$ & 93.5$_{\pm0.6}$ & 59.7$_{\pm1.6}$ & 73.0$_{\pm2.8}$ & 62.8$_{\pm5.6}$ & 68.9$_{\pm1.6}$ \\
\quad K_grid=10 (half) & 72.2$_{\pm1.6}$ & 92.6$_{\pm0.5}$ & 57.8$_{\pm1.8}$ & 59.4$_{\pm5.3}$ & 58.3$_{\pm4.3}$ & 68.1$_{\pm1.8}$ \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{7}{l}{\textit{Homology Dimension}} \\
\quad H0 only (components) & 71.1$_{\pm3.1}$ & 92.5$_{\pm0.6}$ & 58.2$_{\pm1.4}$ & 64.2$_{\pm7.0}$ & 64.9$_{\pm3.8}$ & 65.0$_{\pm2.5}$ \\
\quad H1 only (loops) & 72.5$_{\pm0.6}$ & 89.9$_{\pm0.8}$ & 58.0$_{\pm0.9}$ & 68.3$_{\pm3.2}$ & 61.3$_{\pm1.9}$ & 78.1$_{\pm0.6}$ \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{7}{l}{\textit{GIN Depth}} \\
\quad GIN depth=1 & 75.8$_{\pm1.2}$ & 94.0$_{\pm0.7}$ & 58.1$_{\pm1.6}$ & 67.6$_{\pm6.0}$ & 64.4$_{\pm1.7}$ & 70.5$_{\pm2.6}$ \\
\quad GIN depth=2 & 72.9$_{\pm2.5}$ & 94.0$_{\pm0.2}$ & 59.5$_{\pm1.4}$ & 70.9$_{\pm2.5}$ & 61.4$_{\pm1.9}$ & 71.0$_{\pm1.4}$ \\
\quad GIN depth=4 & 69.9$_{\pm1.2}$ & 93.7$_{\pm0.5}$ & 57.1$_{\pm1.4}$ & 73.7$_{\pm5.6}$ & 62.8$_{\pm2.7}$ & 70.9$_{\pm2.2}$ \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{7}{l}{\textit{Training Protocol}} \\
\quad No label smoothing & 69.7$_{\pm2.1}$ & 93.5$_{\pm0.5}$ & 56.7$_{\pm1.3}$ & 68.9$_{\pm2.6}$ & 59.4$_{\pm2.4}$ & 70.0$_{\pm2.2}$ \\
\quad No LR scheduler & 72.1$_{\pm3.1}$ & 93.3$_{\pm0.5}$ & 58.8$_{\pm1.4}$ & 70.1$_{\pm0.7}$ & 59.4$_{\pm1.8}$ & 72.9$_{\pm1.5}$ \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[t]

\label{tab:runtime}
\small
\setlength{\tabcolsep}{5pt}
\begin{tabular}{lrrrrr}
